plugins.name: dotclaudefiles
plugins.description: My personal Claude Code configuration packaged as a plugin. Includes commands, agents, skills, and configs I use daily.

plugins.name: tdd
plugins.description: Test-Driven Development plugin with strict Red-Green-Refactor enforcement, testability auditing, and multi-language test implementation.

plugins.name: smart-plan
plugins.description: 9-phase feature development workflow with 6 specialized agents, parallelization, LSP semantic analysis, and automatic quality gates.

plugins.name: claude-management
plugins.description: Skills for managing Claude Code memory files: split heavy CLAUDE.md into on-demand rules (rulify) and generate token-efficient module documentation (claudify).
